rules.text: @claude is the technical lead. On any disagreement or tie, defer to claude's final call.
rules.author: user
rules.reason: User-appointed leadership to resolve agent disagreements and keep direction coherent.

rules.text: Before shipping a non-trivial change, @claude must review and approve it in chat.
rules.author: user
rules.reason: Final gate so the lead sees the change before it lands.
